baseline.observed: ignored output value and returned output_path=null
repaired one prompt across default sources

observed_weaknesses: Missing --source values silently widened scans to all sources.

selected_candidate.reason: Prevent missing values from silently widening scan or repair scope.

safety_controls: The change is limited to CLI parsing.
